mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_path, m.parent_menu_id, m.menu_level, m.sort_order, m.icon, BOOL_OR(rm.can_read) AS can_read, BOOL_OR(rm.can_create) AS can_create, BOOL_OR(rm.can_update) AS can_update, BOOL_OR(rm.can_delete) AS can_delete, BOOL_OR(rm.can_export) AS can_export, BOOL_OR(rm.can_print) AS can_print FROM platform_v3.cm_menu m INNER JOIN platform_v3.cm_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.menu_id WHERE m.use_yn = 'Y' AND rm.role_id IN #{r} GROUP BY m.menu_id, m.menu_name, m.menu_path, m.parent_menu_id, m.menu_level, m.sort_order, m.icon ORDER BY m.menu_level, m.sort_order
